name: piqi-tools-batch
description: Batch PIQI utilities for Excel ingestion, API submission, and Access persistence

scripts.check: node --check src/cli/init-access-db.js && node --check src/cli/process-lab-excel.js && node --check src/core/lab-piqi-core.js && node --check src/api/piqi-api.js && node --check src/db/access-db.js && node --check src/audit/flat-file-audit.js && node --check compare-benchmarks.js
